title: phonk edit
description: its the youtube shorts skull phonk edits, but in minecraft!
body:
# Phonk Edit

i saw a tweet talking about how it would be funny if the youtube shorts skull phonk edits were a real mod in minecraft, so i did just that.

## What's Included

### Audio
- **12 phonk tracks** (more than double the original!)
- Random track selection
- Pitch shifter for variety

### Visuals
- **19 default skull images**
- **Custom skull support** - add your own PNGs!
- **1 special skull20** for PHONK6
- Freeze frame greyscale imagery
- Motion blur effects
- Screen shake
- Cinematic bars (9:16 phone video style)
- aura

## Highly Configurable

### Basic Settings
- Slider for frequency of phonk
- Slider for speed range of the phonk
- Toggle grayscale on/off
- Toggle variable speed on/off

### Visual Effects
- Toggle motion blur on/off
- Toggle screen shake on/off
- Toggle cinematic bars on/off
- Adjust blur intensity and fade
- Adjust shake intensity

### Triggers
6 different trigger types:
- Block breaking
- Block placing
- Combat/hitting entities
- Taking damage
- Low health
- Air time

### Control Options
- Camera freeze
- Movement freeze
- Configurable trigger chance

## Custom Content

Drop your own skull images in `.minecraft/config/phonkedit/images/`

![demostration of the mod, a grayscale image of minecraft with a skull on the lower thirds of the image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c267ffb2e8146d47363d540c8c26b6b4d763067a.webp)

![demostration of the mod, a grayscale image of minecraft with a skull on the lower thirds of the image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527e4348e10675cdf13bd2bc7a51670ce8772982.webp)

![demostration of the mod, a grayscale image of minecraft with a skull on the lower thirds of the image. the player is hitting a pig.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac87e3ebf816f342541da70ec29664b9c74cd4da.webp)

![a view of the settings menu for the mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/737ac465b740023b2e89e2c0af468266c701d241_0.webp)

## See It In Action

Video of the mod:

https://x.com/coah80/status/1979429045063553411


this mod used to be called: youtube shorts phonk edit , so if you were searching for that, there you go.
